summary: Manual spec review approved GH-101 product/content head 306ef287536e1c06c7ab4af026714f9e3ffc093f. The minimal spec, plan, implementation contract, task carrier, and build evidence describe a bounded #101-#104 shell batch and explicitly exclude #105-#113, real owner API calls, task/run/result/evidence behavior, write-side behavior, full Library/Browser management, and workflow runtime/editor UI.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-03 final local validation passed `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`. Worker review findings for 960px layout, Settings endpoint validation, and smoke coverage were fixed and revalidated. `loom build --target . --item GH-101 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-101/build-evidence.json --json` remains blocked by Loom build surface suite CLI JSON consumption (`suite validate CLI JSON unavailable` / repo-local `tools/loom.py` lookup); total dispatch allowed PR creation without adding a repo-local Loom shim.
follow_ups: #105-#109 remain for the #94 Core task path / read-only run view batch; GH-101 does not complete #94.
#110-#113 remain for the #95 evidence, package source, and execution-site reference batch; GH-101 does not complete #95.
Fix the Loom review-record / suite CLI JSON consumption surface outside this App product PR so authored review records can be created by the tool again.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-101 spec path is minimal and sufficient for the shell batch. It preserves Task Thread first scope, direct Identity Runtime Session boundaries, Core task path boundaries, Lode capability metadata-first semantics, and the Electron OS/local-config boundary.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json
consumed_inputs.known_tool_blocker: loom build / review record suite CLI JSON consumption blocked; no repo-local tools/loom.py added
